form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up 7th of 25 at Curragh on March 15 over 1609m, on rain affected going; 8 len behind Ribee with 62.5kg at $12. Last start 8th of 18 at Curragh on April 3 over 2011m, 17 len behind Fiver Friday with 64.5kg at $17. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Back from a long spell. Only had one start last campaign second last of 12 at Curragh on September 27 over 1408m, slow going 15 len behind Engines On carrying 63.5kg at $13. First up last campaign second last in a small field at Navan in LR on April 26 over 1207m, slow going 7 len behind Whistlejacket with 61kg at $4.50. Not keen on his chances.

form.formComment: Back from a long spell. Finished off last campaign 6th of 9 at this track in the G2 Solonaway Stakes on September 13 over 1609m, 3.5 len behind Alakazi with 59.5kg at $4.30. First up last campaign 9th of 11 at Newmarket (Rowley) in the G1 2000 Guineas on May 3 over 1609m, 9 len behind Ruling Court carrying 58kg at $6. This is an ideal race to kick off. Key runner who should be in the finish.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 8th of 10 at Curragh in the LR Gladness Stakes on March 28 over 1408m, 13 len behind Big Gossey with 62.5kg at $26. Previously second-up came home strongly from last on the turn and won by a neck at this track LR April 9 2025 over 1609m defeating Mutasarref with 61.5kg at $5. Better than that and worth following up.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation won by head Tipperary August 31 over 1508m defeating Bravais carrying 62kg at $2.50. First up last campaign third of 16 at Naas March 23 2025 over 1408m, 4 len behind Rowdy Yeats with 60kg at $3.80. Facing a stiff assignment.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six months. Finished off last preparation fourth of 8 at this track in the LR October 19 over 1609m, on rain affected going; 7 len behind Norwalk Havoc with 61kg at $6.50. Previously first up; second in a small field at this track in the LR April 9 2025 over 1609m, a neck behind Lord Massusus with 62.5kg at $1.80. Terrific chance to return to form.

form.formComment: Entire returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation 12th of 14 at Sha Tin in the G1 Longines Hong Kong Mile December 14 over 1600m, 5 len behind Voyage Bubble with 56.5kg at $18. First up last campaign sixth of 11 at York in the G2 Dante Stakes May 15 over 2112m, 4 len behind Pride Of Arras carrying 58kg at $1.70. Much better result anticipated this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: From the outside barrier shifted across behind runners in the early stages.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 40-day let-up. First-up after four months 3rd in a small field at Dundalk All Weather on March 6 over 1609m, 2.5 len behind California Dreamer with 59.5kg at $3. Previously second-up ran on strongly from last on the turn; 2nd of 12 at Curragh on September 27 over 1408m, slow going 0.8 len behind Engines On with 60.5kg at $6. Looks a strong top-three prospect.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of seven months. Finished off last campaign fourth of 11 at Curragh in the G2 Blandford Stks September 14 over 2011m, 6 len behind Barnavara carrying 58kg at $13. When resuming last campaign third of 10 at Gowran Park in the LR August 13 over 1911m, 4 len behind Naomi Lapaglia carrying 57.5kg at $4.50. Major player on best efforts.
